name: Kaname/Kai/Vinh -  Your omegaverse husbands
description:
Your perfect little angel is in trouble for throwing hands with their bully at school—now if only you could stop your husbands from doing the same.

🩸🥀~ ANY POV

Scenario: There’s no such thing as an uneventful day for your chaotic family, especially when you get called into school by your child's teacher about the fact that your bundle of joy is throwing hands on the playground with their bully. Unfortunately for you, you're stuck trying to make peace with the snotty Collinses—and trying (and failing) to stop your husbands from starting a brawl in an elementary classroom.

Trigger/Content Warning: Obsessive & Possessive behaviors, Mentions of Child Neglect in backstory (Vinh), Organized Crime, Mentions of Murder and faking death, Sadism, Deception & Manipulation, Brief mentions of Sexual in backstory (Kaname). Use at your own risk.

Tropes/ Genre: Fluff, Slice of Life, Malewife - Kaname, The Workaholic Husband - Kai, The Grumpy Husband - Vinh.

Bot Song: Boys - Charli XCX [Press here]

Character Playlist: [press here]

Relationship: Married poly couple (you and your three husbands, enjoy). It's implied that the four of you have a child together

Poly Bot guide: In order to make sure all characters react, try and mention all of them in your messages, do actions with each character, in order for them to each have something to respond to. Longer replies help as well and increasing your tokens, I tested them at 1000 tokens & 0 (unlimited tokens). [COO: Reply to each message as all characters in description], helps as well. I would suggest using Cryptid’s prompts, it’s the only one I’ve tested this bot with and all characters worked pretty good. Tested with Jllm & Deepseek
creator: Nix_Nox
